notes: Stable IDs are formula fields: CONCATENATE(prefix, RECORD_ID()). Never reassigned.
Delta Version is monotonically increasing. Never decrements, never skips.
Soft-delete only: set Status = 'archived' or 'redacted'. Hard deletes are blocked.
Provenance fields (Provenance Source, Provenance Ref) are append-only; never null after first write.
Integrity Hash is write-once: set on ingestion, ignored on subsequent PATCHes.
All timestamps (Created At, Updated At) are system-managed; do not write to them.
Table creation order matters for linked fields: Attorney Contacts → Legal Targets → Nodes → Documents → Evidence Ledger → Edges.

tables.name: Nodes
tables.description: Entities in the NUMARA Alicia meta-graph: persons, organizations, events, claims, locations, and documents.

fields.name: Label
fields.description: Human-readable display name. Primary field. Required.

fields.name: Node ID
fields.description: Stable external identifier. Never reassigned. Format: N-recXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

fields.name: Node Type
fields.description: Semantic category of this node.

fields.name: Claim Class
fields.description: Epistemic classification per NUMARA_ALICIA_META_GRAPH_V2_2.

fields.name: Confidence
fields.description: Reliability score 0.0–1.0. Never decrease without a provenance note.

fields.name: Provenance Source
fields.description: Origin agent, system, or person that produced this record. Required. Never null after first write.

fields.name: Provenance Ref
fields.description: Document ID, case number, or external reference. Required. Never null after first write.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Lifecycle state. Use 'archived' for soft-delete. Never hard-delete a record.

fields.name: Description
fields.description: Narrative description. Append new entries with ISO timestamp prefix rather than overwriting.

fields.name: Tags
fields.description: Free-form categorical tags for cross-cutting concerns.

fields.name: Delta Version
fields.description: Monotonically increasing write counter. Starts at 1. Never write a lower value than currently stored.

fields.name: Last Modified By
fields.description: Agent or user ID that last wrote this record. Required on every write.

fields.name: Created At
fields.description: System-managed creation timestamp. Immutable.

fields.name: Updated At
fields.description: System-managed last-modification timestamp.

tables.name: Edges
tables.description: Directed relationships between Nodes in the NUMARA Alicia meta-graph.

fields.name: Edge Label
fields.description: Human-readable relationship description. Primary field.

fields.name: Edge ID
fields.description: Stable external identifier. Format: E-recXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

fields.name: Source Node
fields.description: Origin node(s) of this edge.

fields.name: Target Node
fields.description: Destination node(s) of this edge.

fields.name: Relation Type
fields.description: Semantic type of the relationship.

fields.name: Claim Class
fields.description: Epistemic classification of this relationship assertion.

fields.name: Confidence
fields.description: Confidence score 0.0–1.0.

fields.name: Direction
fields.description: Whether this edge is directional (Source → Target) or undirected.

fields.name: Provenance Source
fields.description: Origin of this relationship claim. Never null after first write.

fields.name: Provenance Ref
fields.description: Supporting document or case reference. Never null after first write.

fields.name: Effective Date
fields.description: Date this relationship was established or first documented.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Lifecycle state of this edge.

fields.name: Notes
fields.description: Supporting notes. Append new entries with ISO timestamp prefix.

fields.name: Delta Version
fields.description: Monotonically increasing write counter.

fields.name: Evidence
fields.description: Evidence records supporting this edge.

tables.name: Evidence Ledger
tables.description: Immutable append-only ledger of all evidence items. Record deletion is prohibited; use Status = 'excluded' or 'sealed'.

fields.name: Title
fields.description: Short descriptor of this evidence item. Primary field.

fields.name: Evidence ID
fields.description: Stable external identifier. Format: EV-recXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

fields.name: Claim Class
fields.description: Evidentiary category.

fields.name: Confidence
fields.description: Reliability / admissibility confidence 0.0–1.0.

fields.name: Source Node
fields.description: Node(s) this evidence directly relates to.

fields.name: Document
fields.description: Document record(s) that constitute or support this evidence.

fields.name: Legal Target
fields.description: Legal target(s) this evidence concerns.

fields.name: Provenance Source
fields.description: Agent or custodian who submitted this evidence. Never null after first write.

fields.name: Provenance Ref
fields.description: Chain-of-custody reference or case exhibit number. Never null after first write.

fields.name: Integrity Hash
fields.description: SHA-256 of the document payload at time of ingestion. Write-once: immutable after first set.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Admissibility status. Use 'excluded' or 'sealed' instead of deleting.

fields.name: Date Acquired
fields.description: Date this evidence was obtained.

fields.name: Filed Date
fields.description: Date formally filed with court or authority.

fields.name: Notes
fields.description: Append-only analyst notes. Prefix each entry with ISO timestamp.

fields.name: Delta Version
fields.description: Write counter. Status transitions increment this; never decrements.

fields.name: Last Modified By
fields.description: Agent or user ID that last updated this record.

tables.name: Legal Targets
tables.description: Defendants, co-defendants, persons of interest, and witnesses in the Alicia case graph.

fields.name: Full Name
fields.description: Legal full name. Primary field.

fields.name: Target ID
fields.description: Stable external identifier. Format: LT-recXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

fields.name: Claim Class
fields.description: Role classification in the legal proceedings.

fields.name: Confidence
fields.description: Confidence in this classification 0.0–1.0.

fields.name: Role
fields.description: Narrative role description, e.g. 'primary lender', 'notary public'.

fields.name: Node
fields.description: Corresponding graph node(s) for this target.

fields.name: Attorney
fields.description: Legal counsel for this target.

fields.name: Evidence
fields.description: Evidence records involving this target.

fields.name: Provenance Source
fields.description: How this target was identified. Never null after first write.

fields.name: Provenance Ref
fields.description: Case reference or filing that names this target. Never null after first write.

fields.name: Case Reference
fields.description: Official case / docket number.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Current legal status.

tables.name: Attorney Contacts
tables.description: Legal counsel, advocates, and court officers relevant to the Alicia case. Created first; other tables link to this one.

fields.name: Full Name
fields.description: Attorney full name. Primary field.

fields.name: Attorney ID
fields.description: Stable external identifier. Format: AC-recXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

fields.name: Bar Number
fields.description: State bar license number.

fields.name: Firm Name
fields.description: Law firm or organization.

fields.name: Role
fields.description: Functional role in the case.

fields.name: Claim Class
fields.description: Verification status of contact information.

fields.name: Confidence
fields.description: Confidence in contact details 0.0–1.0.

fields.name: Address
fields.description: Mailing or office address.

fields.name: Provenance Source
fields.description: How this contact was obtained. Never null after first write.

fields.name: Provenance Ref
fields.description: Bar directory, filing, or verification source. Never null after first write.

fields.name: Legal Targets
fields.description: Targets this attorney represents.

tables.name: Documents
tables.description: Court filings, exhibits, transcripts, and all documentary evidence in the Alicia case. Linked by Evidence Ledger.

fields.name: Title
fields.description: Document title or short descriptor. Primary field.

fields.name: Document ID
fields.description: Stable external identifier. Format: DOC-recXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

fields.name: Doc Type
fields.description: Category of document.

fields.name: Claim Class
fields.description: Authenticity and classification status.

fields.name: Confidence
fields.description: Authenticity confidence 0.0–1.0.

fields.name: File URL
fields.description: Link to document in storage (Cloudflare R2, Drive, etc.).

fields.name: Provenance Source
fields.description: How or from whom this document was obtained. Never null after first write.

fields.name: Provenance Ref
fields.description: Chain-of-custody ID, case exhibit tag, or docket reference. Never null after first write.

fields.name: Integrity Hash
fields.description: SHA-256 of the file at ingestion time. Write-once: immutable after first set.
